[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@exprealty/shared-domain](./shared-domain.md) &gt; [AgentExpandedSchema](./shared-domain.agentexpandedschema.md)

## AgentExpandedSchema variable

Zod schema for an agent with optional joined relations. Includes: - agentCompany (many-to-one) - addresses (one-to-many through AgentAddress association)

**Signature:**

```typescript
AgentExpandedSchema: z.ZodObject<
	{
		id: z.ZodString
		createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
		email: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>
		agentCompanyId: z.ZodString
		firstName: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>
		lastName: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>
		preferredName: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		suffix: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodEnum<['Jr', 'Sr', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V', 'MD', 'PhD', 'Esq']>
		>
		birthDate: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>
	} & {
		agentCompany: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodObject<
				{
					id: z.ZodString
					legacyId: z.ZodString
					email: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>
					name: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>
					phone: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'PhoneNumber'>
					useSsn: z.ZodBoolean
					createdAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
					updatedAt: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
				} & {
					taxId: z.ZodNullable<z.ZodString>
					taxIdHashed: z.ZodNullable<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Hash'>>
					agents: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodLazy<z.ZodArray<z.ZodAny, 'many'>>>

				'strip',
				z.ZodTypeAny,
				{
					id: string
					createdAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
					updatedAt: Date & z.BRAND<'InstantUTC'>
					name: string & z.BRAND<'Name'>
					email: string & z.BRAND<'Email'>
					legacyId: string
					phone: string & z.BRAND<'PhoneNumber'>
					useSsn: boolean
					taxId: string | null

					agents?: any[] | undefined

						role: z.ZodOptional<
```
